message.content:
# VelRoll Website Visual Design Specification

## 1. Color Scheme

**Primary Gradient Background:**
- Header background: Linear gradient from `#8B5CF6` (violet) to `#EC4899` (pink) - smooth transition across the header
- Main background: Solid `#121212` (near-black) for the page background

**Panel Colors:**
- Card backgrounds: `#1E1E1E` (very dark gray) with 90% opacity
- Input field backgrounds: `#2A2A2A` (dark gray)

**Text Colors:**
- Primary text: `#FFFFFF` (white)
- Secondary text: `#A0A0A0` (light gray)
- Accent text: `#FBBF24` (yellow) for crown icon
- Purple accent: `#8B5CF6` (violet) for icons and button text

**Button Colors:**
- Primary button: `#8B5CF6` (violet) background with white text
- Button hover state: Slightly lighter `#9C6EF5` (violet)

**Border Colors:**
- Panel borders: `#333333` (dark gray) with 1px width

## 2. Layout Structure

**Header:**
- Full-width container with 32px padding (left and right)
- Height: 120px
- Contains logo, title, description, and stream quiz box

**Main Content Grid:**
- Three-column grid layout on desktop
- Each column width: ~33.33%
- Column spacing: 24px between columns
- Card padding: 24px (top/bottom) and 32px (left/right)

**Footer:**
- Not visible in current view but would follow standard website footer patterns

## 3. Glass/Transparent Panel Effects

- Cards have a semi-transparent dark background (`#1E1E1E` with 90% opacity)
- Subtle backdrop blur effect (blur radius: 10px) for depth
- Slight transparency allows the dark background to show through
- Cards have a subtle inner glow effect

## 4. Button Styles and Colors

**Primary Button:**
- Background: `#8B5CF6` (violet)
- Text: `#FFFFFF` (white)
- Padding: 12px 24px
- Border: None
- Rounded corners: 12px
- Font weight: 600 (semi-bold)
- Icon: White lightning bolt icon positioned left of text
- Hover effect: Background lightens to `#9C6EF5` with smooth transition

## 5. Font Styles

**Primary Font:**
- Family: Inter (or similar sans-serif)
- Header text: 36px, 700 (bold)
- Section titles: 24px, 600 (semi-bold)
- Body text: 16px, 400 (regular)
- Input labels: 14px, 500 (medium)
- Button text: 16px, 600 (semi-bold)

**Text Hierarchy:**
- VelRoll title: Largest, boldest text
- Section headers: Medium-large, semi-bold
- Form labels: Smaller, medium weight
- Input placeholders: Light gray, regular weight

## 6. Border Radius Values

- Cards: 16px
- Input fields: 8px
- Buttons: 12px
- Stream quiz box: 8px
- Logo icon: 12px (rounded square)

## 7. Shadow Effects

- Cards: Subtle box shadow with:
  - Horizontal offset: 0px
  - Vertical offset: 4px
  - Blur radius: 20px
  - Spread radius: 0px
  - Color: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)` (30% black)
- Input fields: Same shadow as cards but with reduced opacity
- Header: No shadow (gradient provides depth)

## 8. Icon Usage

- Logo: White rounded square with purple icon (looks like a chat bubble or game controller)
- Section icons:
  - Management: Purple gear icon
  - Winner: Yellow crown icon
  - Participants: Purple list icon
- Form icons:
  - Streamer name: Purple user icon
  - Keyword: Purple hashtag icon
- Button icon: White lightning bolt

## 9. Card/Panel Backgrounds and Borders

**Card Structure:**
- Background: `#1E1E1E` (dark gray) with 90% opacity
- Border: 1px solid `#333333` (dark gray)
- Border radius: 16px
- Padding: 24px (top/bottom) and 32px (left/right)
- Margin bottom: 24px

**Input Fields:**
- Background: `#2A2A2A` (darker gray)
- Border: 1px solid `#333333`
- Border radius: 8px
- Padding: 12px 16px
- Margin top: 8px

**Stream Quiz Box:**
- Background: White
- Border: 1px solid `#E5E5E5` (light gray)
- Border radius: 8px
- Padding: 16px
- Text: Bold, uppercase

## Exact Layout Dimensions

- Container max-width: 1200px (centered on page)
- Header height: 120px
- Card height: Variable based on content
- Input field height: 48px
- Button height: 48px
- Section spacing: 32px between cards

This specification provides all the necessary details to recreate the VelRoll website design exactly as shown in the reference image.
